heading.purpose: Landing hero and page-level headings. 1.875rem–3rem fixed scale.

title.purpose: Card degree names, section subheadings. The workhorse step.

body.purpose: Most UI text — card bodies, descriptions, 65–75ch max for prose.

label.purpose: Badge text, control labels, nav links. 500 weight lifts small text.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Used on all data cards at rest. Structural, not interactive.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active). 150ms.

components.name: Surface Button
components.description: The primary CTA button. Bordered surface style — present but not demanding.
components.css: .ds-btn-surface { background: #18181b; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid #27272a; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-surface:hover { background: #27272a; border-color: #3f3f46; } .ds-btn-surface:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4ade80; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-surface:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Confirmation Badge
components.description: School/institution names. Green = place. Always used with a location icon.
components.html: Aalto-yliopisto
components.css: .ds-badge-confirm { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #0d2b1a; color: #86efac; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Data Badge
components.description: Numeric data — applicant counts, start spots. Blue = quantity.
components.html: 428 hakijaa
components.css: .ds-badge-data { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #0c1e3c; color: #93c5fd; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Degree Card
components.description: The primary data display unit. Contains degree name, school badge, and data badges.
components.html:
Tietojenkäsittelytiede, kandidaattiohjelma

Aalto-yliopisto
428 hakijaa60 aloituspaikkaa
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111111; border-radius: 0.375rem; box-shadow: 0px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.64), inset 0px 0px 1px rgba(180,180,180,0.18); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 8px 12px 6px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #fafafa; line-height: 1.5; text-wrap: pretty; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { padding: 4px 12px 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; } .ds-badge-confirm { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #0d2b1a; color: #86efac; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-data { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #0c1e3c; color: #93c5fd; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The primary search field for filtering degrees and schools.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="search" placeholder="Hae koulua tai linjaa" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #18181b; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4ade80; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Lowercase nav links with vertical separators. Voice, not UI chrome.
components.html: etusivuhakijamäärätkoulutukset
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #fafafa; text-decoration: none; transition: text-decoration 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4ade80; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-nav-sep { width: 1px; height: 1rem; background: #27272a; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
yhteishaku.app is a civic data tool — it exists to surface public information that students deserve to have before making one of the most consequential decisions of their early adult lives. The visual system reflects this: nothing decorative, nothing self-promotional, nothing that competes with the numbers.

The dominant mode is restraint. A deep, near-black void as the base. Two functional accent colors — one for place (Confirmation Green), one for quantity (Data Blue). Everything else is handled by the gray ramp.

This system explicitly rejects: (1) the generic SaaS dashboard aesthetic — no glassmorphism, no hero-metric templates; (2) the heavy Opintopolku.fi government portal look — no navy headers, no institutional weight.
keyCharacteristics: Deep void base with tight tonal layering (3 dark surfaces)
Two accent colors used for semantic roles only, never decoration
One typeface (Inter), fixed scale, no display-font moments
Flat-by-default elevation; shadows appear only as card lift
Lowercase Finnish navigation — voice, not laziness

rules.name: The Two Accents Rule
rules.body: Green is place; blue is quantity. Never swap them. Never use either for decoration.

rules.name: The Contrast Floor Rule
rules.body: Muted Ink (#a1a1aa) is the lightest text color permitted. It sits at 4.6:1 against Deep Void — WCAG AA compliant.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter everywhere. No display font, no decorative pairing. Typography is not where this product differentiates.

rules.name: The Lowercase Nav Rule
rules.body: Navigation links are lowercase intentionally. This is voice: unhurried, direct, Finnish. Don't title-case, uppercase, or track-letter-space them.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Only data cards use shadows. Everything else is flat. No floating panels, no dramatic lifts, no glassmorphism.

dos: Do keep Confirmation Green (#4ade80) for school/location badges and the brand word only.
Do keep Data Blue (#60a5fa) for numeric data badges only.
Do render degree names with text-wrap: pretty to prevent orphans.
Do use Muted Ink (#a1a1aa) as the lightest allowable text color.
Do use skeleton placeholder blocks, not spinners, for loading states.
Do keep navigation links lowercase and un-tracked.
Do use focus outlines in Confirmation Green on all interactive elements.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism, blurred card backgrounds, or backdrop-filter effects as decoration.
Don't display large hero metric numbers with gradient accents.
Don't use nav text in uppercase or with wide letter-spacing.
Don't add a third accent color without a clear semantic role.
Don't use green or blue badges for anything other than their named roles.
Don't add border-left stripe accents to cards or list items.
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text) anywhere.
Don't make cards hover-lift with shadow escalation — use background tint only.
Don't replicate the Opintopolku.fi portal aesthetic.
